title: Chapter 9 - Lists
description: Check understanding of unordered and ordered lists.

questions.prompt: Which tag creates a bulleted list?

byOptionId.li: Incorrect — <li> is a list item tag used inside <ul> or <ol>.
byOptionId.list: Incorrect — <list> is not a valid HTML element.

questions.prompt: Which tag wraps each list item?

explanations.overview: Use <li> inside <ul> or <ol> for each item.

byOptionId.li: Correct — <li> wraps each list item inside <ul> or <ol>.
byOptionId.p:
Incorrect —

is for paragraphs, not list items.
byOptionId.div: Incorrect — <div> may contain list elements but <li> is the semantic list item.
byOptionId.span: Incorrect — <span> is inline and not a list item wrapper.
